nasb.text: Joab said to Amasa, “Is it well with you, my brother?” And Joab took Amasa by the beard with his right hand to kiss him.

esv.text: And Joab said to Amasa, “Is it well with you, my brother?” And Joab took Amasa by the beard with his right hand to kiss him.

cnv.text: 約押對亞瑪撒說：“我的兄弟，你好嗎？”約押用右手握住亞瑪撒的鬍子，要與他親吻。

ccb.text: 约押对亚玛撒说：“兄弟，你好吗？”他用右手抓住亚玛撒的胡子，亲吻他。
